title: Update to the `create_subitem` mutation
excerpt: Please note that the item_name argument is now required for the create_subitem mutation. If you try to send the mutation without the argument, it will return an error.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: Please note that the item_name argument is now required for the create_subitem mutation. If you try to send the mutation without the argument, it will return an error.
